title: Mailchimp vs ActiveCampaign (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Mailchimp and ActiveCampaign. See pricing, features, and which platform suits your business needs best.
h1: Mailchimp vs ActiveCampaign: A Detailed Comparison
intro: Both Mailchimp and ActiveCampaign are popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. Mailchimp excels as an accessible, beginner-friendly option with a free tier, while ActiveCampaign offers advanced automation and CRM capabilities for businesses requiring deeper customer relationship management. This comparison will help you determine which platform aligns best with your marketing goals and budget.
choose_a_if: You're a beginner or startup with a limited budget and want to start free
You need a drag-and-drop editor with basic email marketing capabilities
You have under 500 contacts and want to explore before committing financially
choose_b_if: You need advanced automation, lead scoring, and CRM functionality built-in
You're managing complex customer journeys that require dynamic content and site tracking
You want SMS marketing capabilities alongside email campaigns

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your needs. Mailchimp is better for beginners due to its free tier and simplicity, while ActiveCampaign is better for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM features. ActiveCampaign has higher customer satisfaction ratings (4.5 vs 4.3 on G2, 4.1 vs 1.5 on Trustpilot).

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Mailchimp is cheaper overall due to its free tier supporting up to 500 subscribers. Once you upgrade, Mailchimp starts at $13/month compared to ActiveCampaign's $15/month, but ActiveCampaign includes CRM features that Mailchimp charges extra for.

faq.q: Can I switch from ActiveCampaign to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, you can export your contacts and campaign data from ActiveCampaign and import them into Mailchimp. However, you may lose some advanced automation workflows and CRM data since Mailchimp has less sophisticated capabilities. Plan your migration carefully to avoid losing historical customer information.
